task_completion.visual_evidence: The file /home/ga/snap_data/sentinel2_tci.tif is loaded in the image processing software (e.g., SNAP) and is visible in the Product Explorer or main image view.

task_completion.description: Open the Generic Region Merging tool.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog box or window titled 'Generic Region Merging' is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Configure the segmentation algorithm and its parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the Generic Region Merging dialog, the algorithm is set to 'Baatz & Schäpe', Scale Parameter is '20.0', Shape Parameter is '0.1', and Compactness Parameter is '0.5'.

task_completion.description: Ensure all 3 color bands are included as source bands.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the Generic Region Merging dialog, the source bands selection explicitly includes all 3 color bands from the Sentinel-2 image.

task_completion.description: Save the segmented product in BEAM-DIMAP format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save or target product configuration showing the output path /home/ga/snap_exports/field_segments.dim and the format selected as BEAM-DIMAP.

task_completion.description: Export the segmentation label band as a GeoTIFF.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog or process showing the output path /home/ga/snap_exports/field_segments.tif and the format selected as GeoTIFF.

integrity.description: The agent used the software's GUI to perform the segmentation and export.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through menus, toolbars, and dialogs in the image processing software, rather than running terminal commands or scripts to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely entered the parameters into the tool's interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the parameters (20.0, 0.1, 0.5) being typed or set in the Generic Region Merging dialog, not just pasted into a text file or script.

integrity.description: The agent did not create dummy files to bypass the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent using terminal commands like 'touch' or a text editor to create field_segments.dim or field_segments.tif.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The input file is /home/ga/snap_data/sentinel2_tci.tif. The expected tool is Generic Region Merging using the Baatz & Schäpe algorithm. Parameters must be: Scale=20.0, Shape=0.1, Compactness=0.5. The outputs must be saved to /home/ga/snap_exports/field_segments.dim (BEAM-DIMAP) and /home/ga/snap_exports/field_segments.tif (GeoTIFF).
